context:
INTEL馃攳
=======
馃搶Targets both Windows and Linux
馃挕Most of the executables are sized at 1.25 MB like Akira
馃搶As per their DLS, they are active since February 2025
馃挕No victims are found to be Cross-Claimed by other groups
馃搶Currently there are about 31 Victims (as of August 2025)
馃搶Victims: 馃嚘馃嚪(2),馃嚝馃嚪 馃嚜馃嚫 馃嚠馃嚦 馃嚙馃嚪(2),馃嚘馃嚭 馃嚭馃嚫(2),馃嚤馃嚭 馃嚮馃嚦 馃嚛馃嚜 馃嚚馃嚦
馃搶Their DLS is hosted with nginx/1.26.3
馃搶Negotiation Site is hosted with nginx/1.27.5
馃挕Path is set as: C:\Users\root\Desktop\Trojan\locker\target\x86_64-pc-windows-msvc\release\deps\crypt.pdb
馃挕Babuk Ransomware also spotted to be used the same path previously
馃挕Observed samples are compiled in Rust and only 1 sample was compiled with both Rust and Borland Delphi
馃挕Most of the samples are compiled with Rust, using Clap Parser
馃挕On 4th July 2025, the group had started a Surface Site titled "JTOR" to host the victim leaks and also added a new TOX ID for communication
馃挕The leaks on surface web are powered using Caddy Server
馃搶All the leaks are also made available via Torrent (P2P File Share)
馃挕Windows Host Name used: WIN-AQ7G0H1TG6O running on Windows 10, Windows Server 2016
馃搶Data Encryption: Curve25519, RC4 PRGA
馃搶Data Encoding: XOR, Base64
馃搶Hashing: Murmur3
 


URL
===
https://share.jtor.xyz/
jtor.xyz
